scenarios.id: MatchWhere4 - Non-Equi-Joins on variables-[1] Join nodes on inequality
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a), (b)
WHERE a <> b
RETURN a, b

scenarios.id: MatchWhere4 - Non-Equi-Joins on variables-[2] Join with disjunctive multi-part predicates including patterns
scenarios.description: [2] Join with disjunctive multi-part predicates including patterns
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a), (b)
WHERE a.id = 0
  AND (a)-[:T]->(b:TheLabel)
  OR (a)-[:T*]->(b:MissingLabel)
RETURN DISTINCT b
